page.title: Memory
page.subtitle: Your AI's persistent knowledge across every session

pitch.headline: Memory that follows you
pitch.lede: Wayland remembers what you've worked on, decided, and shipped. Every assistant gets the context -- no re-explaining.
pitch.bullet1: Persistent across chats, projects, and CLIs
pitch.settings_link: Don't want this? You can disable in Settings

upgrading.title: Upgrading Memory
upgrading.subtitle: Staging {{version}} for next boot
upgrading.pending_message: Upgrade ready. Will activate when Wayland restarts.

error.spawn_error: Couldn't start the installer. Check that npm is on your PATH.
error.install_exit_nonzero: Install exited with an error. The details below may help.
error.invalid_target_version: Invalid version number from the registry. Try again later.
error.unsafe_ownership: The pending install folder has unsafe ownership and was rejected. Reinstall to recover.
error.stage_pending_failed: Couldn't stage the new install. Check disk space and try again.
error.stage_swap_failed: Couldn't swap in the new install. Restart Wayland to retry.
error.upgrade_failed_no_rollback: Upgrade failed and the previous version couldn't be restored. Reinstall to recover.
error.upgrade_failed_rolled_back: The upgrade failed but your previous version is still working. Try again later or check details.
error.rollback_also_failed: Both the new version and the rollback failed. Reinstall to recover.
error.mcp_crashed: Memory crashed. Restart Wayland to recover.
error.mcp_error: Memory returned an error. Try again.
error.timeout: Memory didn't respond in time. Try again.
error.validation_failed: That request didn't match what Memory expects.
error.unavailable: Memory isn't running yet. Install or restart to enable.

empty.title: Memory is ready
empty.subtitle: Ask it anything you'd want it to remember next time
empty.placeholder: What should Memory know about you?
empty.chip1: Remember the stack we ship on
empty.chip2: Recall what we decided about auth
empty.chip3: What broke in the last deploy

degraded.toast: Memory will activate after first-time setup
degraded.banner: Memory is currently in degraded mode -- chat still works, but enrichment is off

settings.skip_description: When enabled, Wayland will not install or upgrade IJFW. You can install manually later via the Memory page.
settings.manual_install_hint: To install manually: run `npx -y @ijfw/install@latest` in a terminal

prelude.installing_notice: IJFW is being installed. External CLIs (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) will pick it up after install completes.
prelude.disabled_notice: IJFW is disabled in Wayland Settings. Re-enable to share memory with external CLIs.
prelude.failed_notice: IJFW install failed. Visit the Memory page in Wayland to retry.
